(4) quarrel among (or with) women, (5) frailty of women, (6)

[Under verse 75 supra I had referred to the ungrammatical
expression, which was not made by the author but by the
scribe, as the correct word is used in this verse.]
In the next verse he discusses the types of trees that could be
used for the construction of houses.
For constructing a house one ought to select for timber, trees
other than that are inhabited by birds, that are broken, withered,
burnt, that are in temples and burial grounds, milky trees, Dhava
{Lythrum fruticoswn), Vibhitaka {Beleric myrobalan) > Nimba (Neem)
and Arani (the tree whose twigs are used for churning out fire for
sacrifice).

A tree that had been worshipped with food, etc. the previous
night, should be cut at day-time beginning with the north-eastern
part in a clockwise direction. If it falls towards the north or east,
